name: standalone-task-needs-epic-type
tags: task create gate, issue_type, jira hierarchy, standalone task, epic, no parent, task:d3ee708c
body:
tasks__create rejects issue_type='task' or 'story' when no parent_id is given (JiraHierarchyGate) — only issue_type='epic' is accepted for a standalone, parent-less task.

Why: the hierarchy gate enforces that task/story/subtask types must nest under a parent; there's no 'small standalone task' type in the current vocabulary.

How to apply: when creating a single, self-contained task with no parent, pass issue_type='epic' even if it's not conceptually an epic — don't retry with 'story' or default 'task' first, it will just fail the gate again.
